notes: Can mean 'dense' (e.g. fog, forest), 'tight/sealed' (no leaks), or 'close together'. Also used informally as adverb meaning 'closely' or 'right next to'.

sentences.german: Der Nebel war so dicht, dass ich kaum etwas sehen konnte.
sentences.english: The fog was so thick that I could hardly see anything.

sentences.german: Das Fenster ist nicht dicht – es zieht kalt herein.
sentences.english: The window is not sealed – cold air is coming in.
